# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

static_resources:
  listeners:
    - name: listener_80
      address:
        socket_address: { address: 0.0.0.0, port_value: 80 }
  clusters:
    - name: backend_service1
      connect_timeout: 5s
      type: EDS
      eds_cluster_config:
        eds_config:
          ads: {}
          resource_api_version: V3
        service_name: backend_service1
    - name: backend_service2
      connect_timeout: 5s
      type: EDS
      eds_cluster_config:
        eds_config:
          ads: {}
          resource_api_version: V3
        service_name: backend_service2
    - name: backend_service3
      connect_timeout: 5s
      type: EDS
      eds_cluster_config:
        eds_config:
          ads: {}
          resource_api_version: V3
        service_name: backend_service3
  routes:
    - name: route1
      match: { prefix: "/" }
      route:
        cluster: backend_service1
        weighted_clusters:
          clusters:
            - name: backend_service1
              weight: 1
            - name: backend_service2
              weight: 1
            - name: backend_service3
              weight: 1
    - name: route2
      match: { prefix: "/api/v1" }
      route:
        cluster: backend_service1
        prefix_rewrite: /api/v2
        host_rewrite: service.example.com
        path_rewrite: /path/to/resource
    - name: route3
      match: { regex: "^\/[a-z]{3}$" }
      route:
        cluster: backend_service1
        prefix_rewrite: /
        host_rewrite: service.example.com
        path_rewrite: /path/to/resource
